songs.title: Peppa Pig Theme
songs.lyrics: Peppa Pig! Peppa Pig! Oink oink oink...

songs.title: Bluey Theme Song
songs.lyrics: Mum, dad, Bingo and me, we're the Heeler family...

songs.title: Bing Theme Song
songs.lyrics: Bing bong, bing bong, bing bing bing bong...

songs.title: Trotro Theme
songs.lyrics: Trotro il piccolo asino, sempre allegro e birichino...

songs.title: PAW Patrol Theme
songs.lyrics: PAW Patrol, PAW Patrol, we'll be there on the double...

songs.title: Let It Go
songs.lyrics: Let it go, let it go, can't hold it back anymore...

songs.title: You've Got a Friend in Me
songs.lyrics: You've got a friend in me, you've got a friend in me...

songs.title: Gotta Catch 'Em All
songs.lyrics: I wanna be the very best, like no one ever was...

songs.title: Cha-La Head-Cha-La
songs.lyrics: Cha-la head-cha-la, nani ga okite mo kibun wa...

songs.title: Moonlight Densetsu
songs.lyrics: Gomen ne sunao ja nakute, yume no naka nara ieru...

songs.title: Winx Club Theme
songs.lyrics: We're the Winx, we're the Winx, join the club, join the club...

songs.title: Rocks (Naruto Opening)
songs.lyrics: Rocks! Fighting dreamers, never give up the fight...

songs.title: We Are! (One Piece)
songs.lyrics: We are, we are on the cruise, we are...

songs.title: Guren no Yumiya (AoT)
songs.lyrics: Fure fure, shōnen yo, sono me ni hikari wo...

songs.title: Again (FMA Brotherhood)
songs.lyrics: Uso dato itta ne, egao de waratte...

artists.name: Entertainment One
artists.bio: Produttore di serie animate per i più piccoli, autore di Peppa Pig e Bluey.

artists.name: Studio Caiman
artists.bio: Produzioni animate dedicate alla prima infanzia, tra cui Bing e Trotro.

artists.name: Nickelodeon / Zagtoon
artists.bio: Grandi produzioni per bambini in età prescolare: PAW Patrol e Miraculous.

artists.name: Disney
artists.bio: Il gigante dell'animazione mondiale, autore di sigle indimenticabili.

artists.name: OLM / Nintendo
artists.bio: I creatori del franchise Pokémon, una delle serie più amate di sempre.

artists.name: Toei Animation
artists.bio: Lo studio giapponese dietro Dragon Ball, Sailor Moon e One Piece.

artists.name: Rainbow SpA
artists.bio: Lo studio italiano creatore di Winx Club.

artists.name: Studio Pierrot
artists.bio: Lo studio dietro Naruto e altri anime di successo.

artists.name: Wit Studio / Bones
artists.bio: Autori di Attack on Titan e Fullmetal Alchemist Brotherhood.
